description: Clarification added to the data section explicitly marking all five values as empirical and clearly distinguishing predictions. The five-point fit is relabeled as being based solely on measured (empirical) data at N=10^6, 10^9, 10^10, 10^11, and 10^12, with predictions (for N > 10^12) named as such.
